name: 葛家大宅
description: 宝殊镇最大的宅邸，葛继先的家。一楼有大厅和书房，二楼是卧室。葛月萝在此居住，朱陵山入赘。大宅内有机关锁保护的密室。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town grand mansion interior, traditional Chinese architecture, oil painting style, warm lighting, wisteria decorations

name: 张家
description: 张先生与张太太的住所，位于镇中心。张太太（实为葛月曼）在此接待来访者，药房内有三种药瓶。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town middle class home, Republican era furnishings, oil painting style, warm lighting

name: 薛家
description: 宝殊镇富户薛达财的家，世居镇内。薛玉帆是其独子，喜欢西洋事物。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town wealthy family home, traditional Chinese mansion, oil painting style, warm lighting

name: 吕家酒馆
description: 镇东的酒馆，由吕松年和吕陆升兄弟经营。柜台、桌椅区、后厨。暗中与太平天国宝藏有关。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town traditional Chinese tavern, wooden counter, oil painting style, warm lantern light

name: 于家
description: 镇东猎户于家，于尚勇和于彦诚兄弟居住。偏僻简陋，有先人牌位。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town hunter cottage, simple rural home, oil painting style, dim lighting

name: 镇中心
description: 宝殊镇的中心区域，各家族宅邸汇聚于此。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town center, traditional Chinese street, oil painting style, warm afternoon light

name: 镇西
description: 宝殊镇西面，有山中亭、野鹿林、坟场。葛月萝常在此打猎。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong mountain town western area, forest path, Chinese pavilion, oil painting style, misty atmosphere

name: 镇东
description: 宝殊镇东面，有吕家酒馆、于家、废堡。太平军曾在此驻扎。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town eastern area, old buildings, oil painting style, dim atmosphere

name: 坟场
description: 宝殊镇的坟场，有冯将军立的石碑和葛家家族墓地。停灵仪式在此举行。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong Baoshu town cemetery, traditional Chinese graves, stone tablet, oil painting style, somber atmosphere

name: 葛家旧屋
description: 山中亭附近的废弃房屋，朱陵山和薛玉帆被绑架关押于此。有猎枪和弹药。

visual.prompt: 1914 Guangdong abandoned house in mountains, dusty interior, oil painting style, dim candlelight

name: 秘密线索
description: 需要特定条件才能触发的秘密回忆线索，共6条（乐婉回忆1-6）

visual.prompt: Mysterious memory fragments, sepia tones, oil painting style, dreamlike atmosphere
